note: Created PD-2026-024-rajaratnam (Raj Rajaratnam / Galleon wiretap case). Title idea 'The Wiretap That Cracked Wall Street'. 30-min mid-feature, R2 (living, convicted at jury trial). Wrote 00_topic/topic.v001.json (score 86, recommendation priority). Mid duration profile (ADR-0008). No paid API/upload/publish.

Built 01_research/sources.v001.json (15 sources: DOJ/SDNY conviction+sentencing releases, SEC $92.8M release, SEC 2009 charges, FBI wiretap account, 2nd Cir 2013 opinion, Gupta DOJ release, Reuters/NYT/Bloomberg, memoir SRC-0014 conditional) and claims.v001.json (20 claims graded A/B/C). R2: conviction-at-trial stateable; superlative attributed; profit hedged to forfeiture; Gupta strictly separate; tippers charged separately. DOJ/SEC pages can 403 to bots -> verify star quotes verbatim before air. No paid API/upload/publish.

Wrote script.en.v001.md (cold open hook in first 8s paid off in coda; 4 acts THE EDGE/THE WHISPER NETWORK/THE WIRE/THE RECKONING + coda CTA; device = the recorded voice). Generated script.annotated.v001.json (53 spans, 6 chapters) deterministically from the markdown. validate_episode.py = PASS: schema 0 errors, FK 6.06, 25.2 min in mid band (ADR-0008), 20/20 claims used, chapter/span match, manifest checksum == annotated hash. Voice gate: em-dashes 4.24/1000w, conj-starts 11.0%, rhetorical 2, banned-filler 0. script_qc.v001.json written. R2 discipline throughout. No paid API/upload/publish.

Wrote 04_scenes/codex_image_prompts.v001.md (one masterpiece Codex prompt per scene, 16:9 >=3840px, brand palette, no real-person likeness / no real logos / no readable text), and _planning/codex_prompt_024_rajaratnam.md (master design doc) + _planning/codex_local_024_build.md (deterministic build prompt). Filed APR-0001 script-approval gate = PENDING (owner). PUBLISH remains a separate gate requiring R2 legal review. No paid API/upload/publish.

Owner asked to lengthen the narration toward a full 30-min talking cut AND raise quality. Expanded script v001 (in place; never approved, so no new revision) from 3,776 -> 4,835 narration words = ~28.0 min at measured 173wpm (32.2 min on the validator's 150wpm yardstick; still inside mid band 24.0-32.4, ADR-0008). Added 11 scenes (ordinary investor on the other side; how Raj operated the fund; why it matters to anyone with a pension; institutions betrayed from within; psychology of a network where no one feels criminal; the listening-room; the wiretap's civil-liberties unease; the named 'mosaic theory' defense and its collapse; what the verdict broke; the 'shrug that didn't happen' payoff). Scenes 31 -> 42. Regenerated annotated (64 spans) + updated script_qc + manifest annotated checksum. validate_episode.py 24 = PASS (FK 6.2, em 3.31/1000, conj 8.8%, rhetorical 2, 20/20 claims, chapter/span match). R2 discipline preserved; Gupta still strictly separate. Regenerating 04_scenes/codex_image_prompts.v001.md to 42 scenes. No paid API/upload/publish.
